emails.subject: Calpine model
emails.body: Ben, Can you send me the latest Calpine model after correcting IDC draw down schedule and inputting VOM? We need this for "Retail Short" as well. Did you start to work on Retail Short? We have a meeting with Don tomorrow at 5:00pm. Thanks. Jin

emails.subject: Re: calpine model
emails.body: Ben, Another issue I have in my mind is how we handle revenue after 3 and 5 years. Since Calpine will have only 3 or 5 year tolling agreement, it is appropriate to assume Calpine's revenue will come purely from market. Therefore, we may just need one line of revenue, rather than breaking into capacity payment and energy payment. Let's talk to Scott when he gets back to Houston. Jinsung Benjamin Rogers@ECT 02/23/2000 05:14 PM

emails.subject: Calpine model
emails.body: Ben, I think we need to clean the Calpine model. We will get the firmer pricing from Structuring tomorrow. As soon as we have that, we need to come back to Scott with the pricing and the model. Here is some comments. Install switch to see unlevered IRR Clean up IDC Scott wants to see what would be the capacity pricing to get unlevered IRR of 9%. Let's talk in the morning. Jinsung
